methods.name: task_contract_driver
methods.docs: Construct a fully-wired TaskContractDriver for the requested items_dir. Wires FsTaskContractReader, FsImplCatalogSignalReader, and FsImplPlanReader into a PreReviewGateInteractor (check service, D7: three-port constructor) and CoverageVerifyInteractor (coverage service, two-port constructor). Wraps both as Arc<dyn PreReviewGateService> and Arc<dyn CoverageVerifyService> and injects them into TaskContractDriver::new.

methods.name: task_contract_check
methods.docs: Wire and invoke the pre-review liveness gate check. Constructs a TaskContractDriver via task_contract_driver(items_dir), then dispatches TaskContractInput::Check { layer, track_id }. The driver parses CLI strings, calls the check use case (filtered by impl-plan.json task statuses per D7), and renders Passed/Blocked outcomes as CommandOutcome. When layer is None, iterates all 6 canonical TDDD layers and returns a combined verdict.

methods.name: task_contract_coverage
methods.docs: Wire and invoke the attribution-completeness coverage check. Constructs a TaskContractDriver via task_contract_driver(items_dir), then dispatches TaskContractInput::Coverage { track_id }. The driver calls the coverage use case and renders Passed/Blocked outcomes as CommandOutcome. Coverage checks all 6 canonical TDDD layers (whole-catalogue invariant).

TaskContractCompositionRoot.docs: Composition root for the task-contract command family. Wires FsTaskContractReader, FsImplCatalogSignalReader, FsImplPlanReader (D7), PreReviewGateInteractor, CoverageVerifyInteractor, and TaskContractDriver for both sotp task-contract check and sotp task-contract coverage subcommands.
